name: Fresh Salmon with Tricolored Peppercorn Sauce
recipeInstructions:
1. Squeeze the juice from half a lemon over the salmon and barbecue or broil.
Do not overcook.
2. Melt the butter; mix in mustard and lemon juice.
3. When the salmon is done, sprinkle evenly with crushed peppercorns,
add dill, and drizzle the melted butter sauce over all.
4. Serve immediately.
